case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. REINA D MELENDEZ RAMIREZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT REINA D. MELENDEZ RAMIREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, REINA D MELENDEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
